titles.title: PointCloudCrafter: Tools for Handling, Manipulating and Analyzing of Point Clouds

institution.institution_name: Institute of Automotive Technology, Department of Mobility System Engineering, School of Engineering and Design, Technical University of Munich, Germany.
Institute of Automotive Technology, Department of Mobility System Engineering, School of Engineering and Design, Technical University of Munich, Germany.
